description: An urgent email regarding the 'Noise Complaint - Downtown Construction' case has arrived in your personal inbox. Archive the email located at /home/ga/Documents/evidence_email.eml into ArkCase to maintain the chain of custody. Create a new Inbound Correspondence record for the 'Noise Complaint - Downtown Construction' case using the Sender and Body from the file and the Subject 'Urgent: Construction Violation Report'. Attach the original .eml file to the record.

metadata.expected_content_snippet: violation of the city noise ordinance
